[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100100 3
1 0000101001 3
2 0101010110 5
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0101001011 5

70 07 0101000010 3
